BusinessProfile.name: PurchaseRounding
BusinessProfile.Desc: configure offer validity and scale rounding when default value is used, at the product level

BusinessProfile.name: ExtendProductBasedOnDates
BusinessProfile.Desc: Skip extending product validity based on purchase dates and create new instance of product offering.

BusinessProfile.name: RetainPurchaseDatesDuringCancel
BusinessProfile.Desc: Retain purchase date during cancel of a future dated offer that has not yet started when end_t is less than cycle/usage/purchase start_t

Template.name: InvoiceIntegration
Balance Group
Template.Desc: Balance group with a check for zero limit

Template.name: Billinfo
Sharing
